name: savory pie crust
instructions: 1 cup all-purpose flour, 1/2 cup wheat flour, 1 tbsp sugar, 1/2 tsp salt, 1/2 cup fat split between butter and vegetable shortening (more butter than shortening).
notes: some recipes call for a much higher flour-to-fat ratio but this works well enough for a brittle/flaky crust. shortening makes the crust easier to form and stretchier; butter makes it flaky/brittle. more butter than shortening is ideal.
